referencedTypes.resolvedType: { value: string; disabled?: boolean; asChild?: boolean; as?: AsTag | Component }

members.name: value
members.description: The value given as data when submitted with a `name`.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, prevents the user from interacting with the item.

members.name: asChild
members.description: Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

members.name: as
members.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwrite by `asChild`

members.name: symbolize
members.description: Whether to convert the command value to symbol representation.

members.name: orientation
members.description:
Orientation of the component.

Either `vertical` or `horizontal`. Defaults to `horizontal`.

members.name: decorative
members.description:
Whether or not the component is purely decorative.
When `true`, accessibility-related attributes are updated so that that the rendered element is removed from the accessibility tree.

members.description: The default value of the input

members.name: modelValue
members.description: The controlled value of the input

members.name: id
members.description: Id of the input element

members.name: autofocus
members.description: When `true`, the input is auto-focused.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, prevents the user from interacting with the input.

members.name: maxlength
members.description: The maximum number of characters allowed in the input

members.name: minlength
members.description: The minimum number of characters allowed in the input

members.name: pattern
members.description: The pattern attribute of the input

members.name: placeholder
members.description: The placeholder of the input

members.name: readonly
members.description: When `true`, the input is read-only.

members.name: name
members.description: The name of the field. Submitted with its owning form as part of a name/value pair.

members.description: When `true`, indicates that the user must set the value before the owning form can be submitted.

callables.name: inputRef
callables.description: The function to set the input element.

members.name: disabled
members.description: When `true`, prevents the user from interacting with listbox

members.name: dir
members.description:
The reading direction of the listbox when applicable.
If omitted, inherits globally from `ConfigProvider` or assumes LTR (left-to-right) reading mode.

members.name: name
members.description: The name of the field. Submitted with its owning form as part of a name/value pair.

members.name: defaultValue
members.description:
The default value of the selected item(s).

Use this when you need to set the initial state of the items.

members.name: modelValue
members.description:
The controlled value of the selected item(s).

Use this when you need to control the state of the items. Can be bound with `v-model`

members.name: highlightOnHover
members.description: When `true`, hover over item will trigger highlight

members.name: required
members.description: When `true`, indicates that the user must set the value before the owning form can be submitted.

members.name: orientation
members.description:
The orientation of the listbox.
Mainly so arrow navigation is done accordingly (left & right vs. up & down)

members.name: selectionBehavior
members.description: How multiple selection should behave in the collection.

members.name: multiple
members.description:
Determines whether a "single" or "multiple" items can be selected at a time.

This prop will overwrite the inferred type from `modelValue` and `defaultValue`.
